delete.description: Uncomplete a habit for a day

post.description: Complete a habit for a day

get.description: Get journal entry for a day

patch.description: Update journal entry for a day

get.description: Get the ongoing time track (404 = no active track; see ADR-004)

put.description: Update a time track (also used to stop: {stopped: true})

get.description: Get the current identity (authenticated user profile)

post.description: Create a new message (start a new topic)

AttachedEntry.description: AttachedEntry — entry reference on a calendar event

BoxShowResponse.description:
BoxShowResponse — box detail with postings.
The API can return fields at root level or nested under a `box` key.
SDK response decoders normalize the nested variant to flat before decoding.
